children.label: a
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated to the President to carry out this part $72,000,000 for fiscal year 2001, $73,000,000 for fiscal year 2002, and $64,200,000 for fiscal year 2003.

children.label: b
children.text: Amounts appropriated under this section are authorized to remain available until expended.
